title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Amazon Books India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Amazon Books India Holdings Services in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Amazon Books India Holdings Services:
Amazon Books India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Books India Holdings Services!
